calendar.matters:
Petition For Instruction To Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Allysia Holland, Esq., for Ursula Moses, Successor Trustee.

At the court's query, counsel reports that the matter has been resolved and asks if the court is willing to dismiss the matter at her request, on the record. The court advises counsel that it would prefer a formally filed written objection. Counsel acknowledges the court's preference and advises that a request for dismissal will be filed soon.

The Petition for Instruction to Trustee is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
